reasoning: Based on the background provided, Rockstar Games reaffirmed a Fall 2025 release window as of February 2025. While this reaffirmation is a positive signal for a 2025 release, Rockstar has a well-documented history of delaying its major titles (e.g., GTA IV, GTA V, and Red Dead Redemption 2 were all delayed from their initial specific target windows). Because Take-Two Interactive's fiscal year 2026 ends in March 2026, a delay of GTA VI into early 2026 (January–March) would still align with their financial projections while allowing additional time for final polishing. If released in 2025, it is essentially guaranteed to be sold in Europe concurrently (via standard simultaneous global release strategies). Weighing the recent reaffirmation of Fall 2025 against the high base rate of delays for Rockstar titles and the short buffer between Fall (September–November) and the end of the year, I estimate a 63% probability that the game launches within 2025.
